notes: Barrels don't properly roll down angled platforms (angle logic is broken), Mario can barely reach Pauline due to platform/ladder layout issues, no fireballs are ever spawned, visual style is primitive shapes with no real DK resemblance, and the collision/physics feel unreliable making the game nearly unplayable.

The game runs and has basic movement/jumping/ladders, but core Donkey Kong logic is heavily simplified or incorrect (stages reused, no meaningful fireballs/elevators/conveyors, inaccurate barrel behavior, and weak collision/platform handling), so it is only a mediocre benchmark pass.
